about.title: About YuJiang ShipTechnology
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner in marine equipment
about.companyDesc: Founded in 2004, YuJiang ShipTechnology is a leading manufacturer and exporter of marine equipment based in Ningbo, China. With over 20 years of expertise, we provide comprehensive solutions for the global shipbuilding and maritime industry.
about.factoryDesc: Our 50,000㎡ modern production facility is equipped with advanced CNC machines, testing laboratories, and quality inspection systems.
about.teamDesc: Our team of 300+ skilled engineers and technicians ensures every product meets the highest standards.
about.qualDesc: We hold numerous international certifications including ISO 9001, ISO 14001, CE, DNV-GL, and CCS.
about.visionDesc: To be the world's most trusted marine equipment provider.
about.missionDesc: Delivering innovative, reliable marine solutions that power global maritime trade.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Get in touch with our team
contact.addressValue: No. 88 Harbor Road, Beilun District, Ningbo, Zhejiang, China
contact.formSuccess: Message sent successfully! We will respond within 24 hours.
contact.formError: Failed to send message. Please try again.

news.title: Industry News
news.subtitle: Stay updated with the latest maritime industry trends

footer.newsletterDesc: Subscribe to get the latest product updates and industry news

advantages.title: Why Choose YuJiang
advantages.subtitle: Our Advantages
advantages.mfgDesc: Two decades of expertise in marine equipment manufacturing with state-of-the-art production facilities.
advantages.exportDesc: Trusted by shipyards and maritime companies across six continents with reliable global logistics.
advantages.certDesc: Full compliance with international maritime standards including ISO 9001, CE, DNV-GL, and CCS.
advantages.deliveryDesc: Streamlined production and warehousing enable rapid fulfillment for urgent maritime projects.
advantages.customDesc: Our engineering team designs bespoke equipment tailored to your vessel specifications and requirements.
advantages.supportDesc: Round-the-clock expert assistance via phone, email, and WhatsApp for installation and maintenance.
